panels.description: Medium shot: The narrator ('I'), appearing slightly disheveled but determined, reaches out a hand toward the unseen foreground. Soft, dusty light filters in from above the ruins. The narrator's expression is tense but resolute.

bubbles.text: I won't retreat anymore. I'm speaking now!

panels.description: Wide shot: Overhead perspective showing the narrator recoiling slightly in a sunlit, ruined area filled with large, dark blocks of granite. A small, pale, ape-like figure ('The figure') is captured mid-stride, darting away into shadow in the background.

Close-up on the ape-like figure staggering violently as it impacts a large, sharp-edged block of granite. Dramatic shadows engulf the creature, emphasizing its chaotic movement before it vanishes into a deeper shadow area.

Medium close-up on the narrator's face, viewed from slightly above, showing dawning horror and intense focus. Details of flaxen hair and large, unsettling eyes are implied in the flashback imagery surrounding the narrator's head.

Wide shot: The narrator stands cautiously at the edge of a deep, round, well-like opening in the ground, partially obscured by a massive, fallen pillar. The atmosphere is profoundly dark and oppressive within the ruins.

Close-up shot, low angle looking down into the shaft. A single match flares violently in the narrator's hand, weakly illuminating a small, white, moving creature scrambling down the rough inner wall below. The narrator's hand grips the matchstick tightly, shaking slightly.
Medium close-up: Focus tight on the match falling, sputtering out as it drops into darkness. In the immediate foreground, the narrator's fingers are slightly burned and pulled back in surprise.

Montage panel/Full width thought bubble panel: A sweeping, abstract visual representing the narrator's shattering worldview. Silhouettes of the beautiful Overworlders mix uneasily with the shadow of the small, pale creature. Flickering pillars appear ghostly in the background, emphasizing deep existential dread and confusion.

bubbles.text: Two species... heirs to the ages... What hides in the dark below?
